dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 40-day moving average (sma_40) to follow trend direction. Entry conditions trigger on price crossing above/below the MA depending on long/short direction. Exit conditions use crossover reversals as AUTHOR_SILENT did not specify explicit exits. Context-dependent direction allows both long and short trades based on trend direction relative to MA.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 40-day moving average (sma_40) to follow trend direction. Entry conditions trigger on price crossing above/below the MA depending on long/short direction. Exit conditions use crossover reversals as AUTHOR_SILENT did not specify explicit exits. Context-dependent direction allows both long and short trades based on trend direction relative to MA.

source_rule_text: Apply a 40-day moving average and take trading signals from the direction of the trendline to follow trends.
